inline_comments: Walk a form value tree alongside its JSON Schema and coerce string values to their schema-defined types (number, boolean). HTML `<input>` elements always produce string `.value` properties.  Even though the form rendering code converts values correctly for most paths, some interactions (map-field repopulation, re-renders, paste, etc.) can leak raw strings into the config form state.  This utility acts as a safety net before serialization so that `config.set` always receives correctly typed JSON.
Handle anyOf/oneOf — try to match the value against a variant
Try number/boolean coercion for string values
For non-string values (objects, arrays), try to recurse into matching variant
Omit undefined — "clear field = unset" for optional properties
Tuple form: each index has its own schema

functions.name: coerceFormValues
